Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long The dashboard reveals **AGX as the dominant long-term momentum leader** with a commanding rank 1 score of 91.9, driven by extraordinary 10-year returns of 1906.76% and consistent outperformance versus SPY (+1643.77% over 10 years). AGX shows exceptionally clean momentum signals across all time horizons, passing 5 of 5 ratio tests and trading above all major moving averages, though it trades on thin volume (vol_ratio 0.688). The second-ranked ticker **EACO presents an interesting contrast**—while delivering even more dramatic 10-year returns of 1758.23%, it shows weaker intermediate momentum with only 4 ratio passes and a concerning 3-month decline (14.13% vs 16.59% in 1 month), suggesting potential consolidation after a recent +16.59% monthly move. Both tickers significantly outpace SPY and QQQ on extended timeframes, indicating these are secular trend leaders rather than broad-market participants, with AGX's sharper momentum profile positioning it as the more compelling long-term signal today.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
